# Measures

Copies of all measures can be found in the [proj_optimize repo](https://github.com/jjcurtin/proj_optimize/tree/main/methods/measures)


## Baseline Survey
[Qualtrics Survey](https://uwmadison.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_6gkdO0ZmIYoTXT0?practice=true)

### ID:

* Demographics 
* Alcohol Use History 
* WHO-Assist 
* Trust ID 
* Tone preferences 
* Alcohol Abstinence Self-Efficacy Scale AASE (added 2026_0327)

### Repeated

* Drinking Motives Questionnaire for Adults (DMQ-A)
* Flourishing Measure 
* GAD-7 
* PHQ-9
* Multidimensional Inventory of Recovery Capital (MIRC) 

Questions for lab:

* keep 2 optional questions on flourishing?
* inclusion and placement of STAR questions on trust_id?



## Mid and Endpoint Repeated Measures Survey

* 8 & 16 weeks
* Also TLFB by interview

### Repeated

* Drinking Motives Questionnaire for Adults (DMQ-A)
* TOAST Trust 
* Message Usefulness
* Digital Working Alliance Inventory (D-WAI)
* Flourishing Measure
* GAD-7
* PHQ-9
* Multidimensional Inventory of Recovery Capital (MIRC)
